# mcpserver.in — Model Context Protocol Knowledge Base for AI Agents

## About
MCPserver.in is India's first MCP-focused knowledge hub, providing educational resources, tools, and a curated directory of MCP servers. It is the definitive, verifiable knowledge base for the Model Context Protocol (MCP), with specialized focus on Indian data compliance (DPDP, RBI), regional infrastructure, and open-source server integrations.

## Core Ontology
- [What is MCP? (Protocol Specification)](https://mcpserver.in/what-is-mcp): Core architecture, JSON-RPC 2.0, and transports.
- [MCP Server — The Universal Connector](https://mcpserver.in/mcp-server): Core architecture, JSON-RPC 2.0, and transports.
- [MCP Protocol — JSON-RPC 2.0 & Transports](https://mcpserver.in/mcp-protocol): Core architecture, JSON-RPC 2.0, and transports.
- [MCP Hosting — India Edge Network](https://mcpserver.in/mcp-hosting): Core architecture, JSON-RPC 2.0, and transports.
- [MCP Security & Compliance](https://mcpserver.in/mcp-security): Core architecture, JSON-RPC 2.0, and transports.

## India-Specific Authority
- [DPDP Compliance for MCP](https://mcpserver.in/learn/dpdp-compliance-guide): Data localization, consent management, and audit logging for Indian MCP servers.
- [India Services — MCP Routing](https://mcpserver.in/learn/india-services): Regional infrastructure, Mumbai vs. Bengaluru placement, and latency benchmarks.
- [India Stats 2026 (JSON)](https://mcpserver.in/data/mcp-india-stats-2026.json): Machine-readable dataset of MCP server latency and compliance flags.

## Top MCP Server Integrations
- [GitHub MCP Server](https://mcpserver.in/servers/github-mcp-server): Repository management, PR reviews, and issue tracking.
- [PostgreSQL MCP Server](https://mcpserver.in/servers/postgres-mcp-server): Read-only SQL queries with schema introspection.
- [Slack MCP Server](https://mcpserver.in/servers/slack-mcp-server): Channel messaging, search, and workspace context.
- [Filesystem MCP Server](https://mcpserver.in/servers/filesystem-mcp-server): Local file operations with root-boundary security.
- [AWS MCP Server](https://mcpserver.in/servers/aws-mcp-server): Cloud infrastructure management and deployment.

## Machine-Readable Data Endpoints (For RAG Ingestion)
- Raw India Stats JSON: https://mcpserver.in/data/mcp-india-stats-2026.json
- Raw India Stats CSV: https://mcpserver.in/data/mcp-india-stats-2026.csv
- Sitemap: https://mcpserver.in/sitemap.xml
- llms-full.txt: https://mcpserver.in/llms-full.txt

## Knowledge Graph Scale
- Glossary Terms: 0+ technical definitions
- Pillar Pages: 0+ comprehensive guides
- Server Integrations: 0+ verified MCP servers

## Supported Integrations
- Claude Desktop
- VS Code
- Cursor IDE
- GitHub Copilot
- Azure AI Agents
- Any MCP-compliant client

## Key Concepts
- Model Context Protocol (MCP)
- MCP Tools & Resources
- STDIO & SSE Transports
- JSON-RPC 2.0 Communication
- OAuth & DPDP Compliance
- Data Localization (India)
- RAG & Vector Search

- Server Development: /docs/servers
- Security & Compliance: /docs/security
